subcodes.first_line: Contentment in all things is praiseworthy, even in trade and commerce. The aim is the ease of livelihood, for wealth is but transitory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قناعت در هر موردی محبوبست حتّی در تجارت. مقصد سهولت معيشت است زيرا ثروت موقّت است
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @conduct in finance and business, @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
